schema.ion.id › trade › provider › v1

trade/provider/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/provider/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Trade sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

TradeProviderAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/provider/v1#TradeProviderAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
invoicingModel—Whether the brand invoices centrally (one NPWP for all fulfilment centres) or each fulfilment centre invoices separately
invoicingEntity—Legal entity name of the invoicing entity when invoicingModel is CENTRAL. This is the brand's registered legal entity —
storeStatus—Operational status of this provider location. OPEN: accepting orders normally. TEMPORARILY_CLOSED: closed for a defined
operatingHours—Weekly operating schedule as a typed array. Each entry covers one timing type for a day range. Types: ORDER (when orders
holidayCalendar—Future-dated holiday dates on which this location will not accept or fulfil orders. ISO 8601 date format. Empty array if
temporaryClosureEnd—ISO 8601 datetime when temporary closure ends. Required when storeStatus is TEMPORARILY_CLOSED. Timezone must be include
serviceabilityByCategory—Per-category serviceability polygon overrides. When a provider serves different delivery zones for different categories
averagePreparationTime—Average time from order confirm to item ready for logistics pickup at this location. ISO 8601 duration. Used by BAP to c
providerCategory—Category of this provider location. Used by BAP for display, filtering, and UI rendering decisions.
nibRegistered—Whether this provider has a valid active NIB registered with OSS (Online Single Submission). ION Central validates NIB a
trustedSellerBadge—Whether this provider has earned ION Trusted Seller status. Awarded by ION Central based on transaction volume, rating,
handlingTimeMinutes—Time in minutes from order confirm to package ready for logistics. More precise than averagePreparationTime. Used for SL
preferredLogisticsProvider—Preferred on-network logistics provider subscriber ID for this seller's shipments. When marketplaceManagedLogistics=true
marketplaceManagedLogistics—Whether this provider's fulfilments use marketplace-managed logistics (Shopee Xpress, Tokopedia TokoCabang, Amazon MFN)
liveCommerceEnabled—Whether this provider supports live commerce (Shopee Live, Tokopedia Play, TikTok Shop-style sessions). Providers with t
liveCommerceStreamers—Subscriber IDs of authorised streamers who can feature this provider's products in live sessions. Commission and settlem
ottPartnerEnabled—Whether this provider allows its catalog to be surfaced through OTT-embedded shoppable content (Vidio, Netflix, Disney+
kycStatus—Current KYC status of this provider with the BPP platform. Only APPROVED and APPROVED_WITH_CAVEATS providers may publish
kycLevel—KYC depth. Determines maximum transaction value, allowed payment methods, eligibility for Mall/Premium tiers. BASIC: NIB
kycValidUntil—Expiry date of current KYC certification. Providers MUST renew before this date. BPPs MUST block publish_catalog after e
kycEvidenceRef—Opaque reference to KYC evidence bundle (encrypted off-network). Used by ION Central when audit required. Not a URL — in
kycCaveats—When kycStatus is APPROVED_WITH_CAVEATS, these describe the outstanding items. Each caveat has a deadline (tracked off-c
categoryLicenses—Category-specific operating licenses beyond NIB/NPWP. Examples: SIA for alcohol, SIKA for meat, Izin PBF for pharmacy, I

Pack README

trade/provider/v1

Trade sector seller operational attributes — store status, operating hours, serviceability, invoicing.

Attaches to

`beckn:Provider.providerAttributes`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/provider/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
